testCases.input: Can the company end the employment relationship without giving a reason?
testCases.actualOutput: Yes, the company can end the employment relationship without giving a reason (Page 3, Section 6.1).
testCases.expectedOutput: yes, the company can terminate the employment relationship at any time without cause,and with or without notice.

5.2 Intellectual Property: Any software, algorithms, code, data pipelines, processes, or other

6. Term and Termination
6.1  At-Will  Employment: The  employment  relationship  between  the  Company  and  the
Employee is "at-will." This means that either the Company or the Employee may terminate the
employment relationship at any time, with or without cause, and with or without advance
notice.

notice.
6.2 Severance: If the Company terminates the Employee’s employment without "Cause" (as
defined in the Company's standard policies), the Employee shall be entitled to severance pay
equal to one (1) month of base salary for each completed year of service, up to a maximum of
six (6) months, contingent upon the execution of a standard release of claims.
7. General Provisions
7.1 Governing Law: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the
laws of the State of Texas, without regard to its conflicts of law principles.
7.2 Entire Agreement: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties
regarding the terms and conditions of the Employee’s employment and supersedes all prior
agreements, understandings, and representations, whether written or oral.
